release.description: Tag the Directory.Build.props version and push it; CI builds all RID natives + publishes via trusted publishing.

release:dry.description: Trigger a release dry-run on GitHub (build all natives + pack at the current version, no push).
release:dry.command: gh workflow run release.yml -f version="$(grep -oE '<Version>[^<]+' Directory.Build.props | head -1 | sed -E 's/.*<Version>//')" -f dry_run=true && echo 'dry-run dispatched — gh run watch the latest release.yml run'

engine.description: Pin the Turso engine in turso-engine.json (arg: a tag, or 'latest' for newest in series).

pack.description: Tier-0 local release test: build this host's native, pack, and consume-test from a local feed.
